title: Gooey Roasted Turkish Jerusalem Artichoke Stir-fry
description: An earthy and gooey meal-prep dish featuring roasted Jerusalem artichokes with a tangy sesame dressing for an unexpected twist on the classic side dish.
instructions: Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C). Rinse Jerusalem artichokes and slice them into rounds about 1/8-inch thick.
Combine sesame seeds, fresh parsley, minced garlic, olive oil, soy sauce, apple cider vinegar, sugar, salt, and pepper in a small bowl. Mix well to combine.
Place Jerusalem artichoke slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Drizzle with the sesame dressing mixture evenly over the top of the pieces.
Roast for 25-30 minutes or until edges turn golden brown and they are cooked through. Stir occasionally during cooking.
Let it cool slightly before serving. Enjoy as a side dish with your favorite main course.
